guidance: Teach ONE specific, actionable tactic they can do this week to make more money. Real steps, scripts, or settings — worth paying for.
evidence_note: Tactics must be logically airtight and actually executable as described.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Education / Informative' was the most under-served eligible category (target 20%, recent 14%).
post_rationale: Reframed from an unverifiable 'April 2026 update' and a fabricated removal statistic to Google's actual, longstanding review-gating and solicitation policy. Keeps the carousel format for the compliance checklist and still delivers a concrete 3-step fix owners can act on today.

guidance: State a sharp, defensible point of view or contrarian take on how service businesses actually grow. Confident, specific, never gimmicky engagement-bait.
evidence_note: Framed clearly as Black Arrow's view; no fabricated proof.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Contrarian / Brand Point of View' was the most under-served eligible category (target 5%, recent 0%).
post_rationale: Reels still carry the reach edge for cold audiences, and this stakes out a sharp, unclaimed brand POV (scaling ads before fixing follow-up burns money faster) that no past post has argued directly.

guidance: Feature a specific free tool or lead magnet actually published on the site (blackarrow.ltd/tools) or the Revenue Score, and invite a DM with a topic keyword. Lead with the value, never a hard sell.
evidence_note: Only describe tools/offers actually published on the Black Arrow site.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Offers / Lead Magnets' was the most under-served eligible category (target 5%, recent 0%).
post_rationale: Carousels currently win saves and depth for B2B/educational content per 2026 benchmarks, and this fills the under-served Offers/Lead Magnets slot by featuring an actual published free tool tied to the core speed-to-lead fact.

guidance: Honestly handle a common objection or hesitation an owner has about automation/marketing (cost, complexity, 'it feels impersonal'). Build trust.
evidence_note: Transparent and honest; no unsupported guarantees.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Objection Handling / Audience Nurture' was the most under-served eligible category (target 5%, recent 0%).
post_rationale: Fills the under-served Objection Handling category by honestly reframing the top automation fear with 3 concrete, actionable fixes instead of dismissing the concern, using the carousel format that performs well for saves and depth on B2B educational content.
